title: Inside Cardano's 'Van Rossum' hard fork, and what it means for users
summary: The Van Rossem hard fork moved Cardano to version 11 on Saturday. And for the first time, Cardano's community voted in the upgrade, not the company that built it.

title: Exodus to cut 25% of global workforce in payments shift
summary: This restructuring is part of a strategy to build a full-stack payments platform following the company's acquisitions of Monavate and Baanx.

title: AI compute stocks bounce as Hut 8, IREN land billions in new contracts
summary: The deals sparked a rebound in AI compute stocks after investors questioned demand for new data center capacity.

title: Tom Lee's Bitmine slowed ether purchases as it bought back $86 million in stock
summary: The company added just 7,430 ETH, worth about $14 million, last week as it nears its goal to corner 5% of Ethereum's supply.

title: Saylor's Strategy raises cash reserves to $3.2 billion, leaving bitcoin holdings unchanged
summary: For the second consecutive week, the firm kept bitcoin holdings steady, choosing to use the raised capital to boost cash for paying dividends on its preferred stock.
